message.content:
Read these files completely and return their full contents:

1. c:\CLAUDE\Aether\aether-1\src\components\sections\About\AboutSection.jsx
2. c:\CLAUDE\Aether\aether-1\src\components\sections\About\AboutSection.module.css
3. c:\CLAUDE\Aether\aether-1\src\components\sections\Globe\GlobeSection.jsx
4. c:\CLAUDE\Aether\aether-1\src\components\sections\Globe\GlobeSection.module.css
5. c:\CLAUDE\Aether\aether-1\src\components\sections\Hero\HeroSection.module.css (lines 220-236 only — the bottomGradient and media query at the bottom)

content.text: I'll read these files for you now.

content.content:
1 import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react' 2 import { gsap, ScrollTrigger } from '@animations/gsap.config' 3 import styles from './AboutSection.module.css' 4 5 const STATS = [ 6 { target: 5000, suffix: '+', label: 'MISSIONS COMPLETED' }, 7 { target: 150, suffix: '+', label: 'COUNTRIES SERVED' }, 8 { target: 24, suffix: 'H', label: 'AVAILABILITY' }, 9 ] 10 11 const CARDS = [ 12 { 13 index: '01', 14 title: 'Direct Access to\nPrivate Travel', 15 body: 'Bypass commercial terminals entirely. Your aircraft is staged, staffed, and waiting at a private facility of your choosing — departure on your schedule, not the airline\'s.', 16 dir: -1, 17 }, 18 { 19 index: '02', 20 title: 'Your Freedom to\nEnjoy Life', 21 body: 'We value your time above all else. Aether gives you the freedom to live, work, and relax wherever life takes you — without queues, without compromise.', 22 dir: 1, 23 }, 24 { 25 index: '03', 26 title: 'Precision and\nExcellence', 27 body: 'Every detail of your flight — from route planning and in-flight catering to ground transfers — reflects our dedication to perfection at every altitude.', 28 dir: -1, 29 }, 30 { 31 index: '04', 32 title: 'Global Reach,\nPersonal Touch', 33 body: 'With access to 150+ destinations worldwide, Aether brings the world closer to you. Our team manages every aspect of your journey so you never have to.', 34 dir: 1, 35 }, 36 ] 37 38 const MARQUEE_TEXT = 39 'QUIET ALTITUDE  ·  ZERO COMPROMISE  ·  PRIVATE AVIATION  ·  GLOBAL REACH  ·  BESPOKE JOURNEYS  ·  ' 40 41 export default function AboutSection() { 42 const sectionRef = useRef(null) 43 const eyebrowRef = useRef(null) 44 const headlineRef = useRef(null) 45 const bodyRef = useRef(null) 46 const statsRef = useRef(null) 47 const cardsRef = useRef(null) 48 const counterRefs = useRef([]) 49 50 useEffect(() => { 51 const section = sectionRef.current 52 if (!section) return 53 54 const ctx = gsap.context(() => { 55 56 // ── 1. Eyebrow fade 57 gsap.fromTo(eyebrowRef.current, 58 { opacity: 0, y: 12 }, 59 { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power2.out', 60 scrollTrigger: { trigger: eyebrowRef.current, start: 'top 88%', once: true } } 61 ) 62 63 // ── 2. Headline — clip-path line reveal 64 const lineInners = headlineRef.current?.querySelectorAll(`.${styles.lineInner}`) 65 if (lineInners?.length) { 66 gsap.fromTo(lineInners, 67 { yPercent: 110 }, 68 { yPercent: 0, duration: 0.85, ease: 'power3.out', stagger: 0.12, 69 scrollTrigger: { trigger: headlineRef.current, start: 'top 82%', once: true } } 70 ) 71 } 72 73 // ── 3. Body — word stagger 74 const words = bodyRef.current?.querySelectorAll(`.${styles.word}`) 75 if (words?.length) { 76 gsap.fromTo(words, 77 { opacity: 0 }, 78 { opacity: 1, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power1.out', stagger: 0.018, 79 scrollTrigger: { trigger: bodyRef.current, start: 'top 85%', once: true } } 80 ) 81 } 82 83 // ── 4. Stat counters 84 STATS.forEach(({ target, suffix }, i) => { 85 const el = counterRefs.current[i] 86 if (!el) return 87 const obj = { val: 0 } 88 gsap.to(obj, { 89 val: target, 90 duration: 2, 91 ease: 'power2.out', 92 onUpdate: () => { 93 el.textContent = Math.round(obj.val).toLocaleString() + suffix 94 }, 95 scrollTrigger: { trigger: statsRef.current, start: 'top 85%', once: true }, 96 }) 97 }) 98 99 // ── 5. Cards — alternating x direction 100 const cards = cardsRef.current?.children 101 if (cards?.length) { 102 Array.from(cards).forEach((card, i) => { 103 const dir = i % 2 === 0 ? -1 : 1 104 gsap.fromTo(card, 105 { opacity: 0, x: dir * 48 }, 106 { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.65, ease: 'power2.out', 107 scrollTrigger: { trigger: card, start: 'top 88%', once: true } } 108 ) 109 }) 110 } 111 112 }, section) 113 114 return () => ctx.revert() 115 }, []) 116 117 return ( 118

1 import { useEffect, useRef, useState, lazy, Suspense } from 'react' 2 import { feature } from 'topojson-client' 3 import { gsap, ScrollTrigger } from '@animations/gsap.config' 4 import styles from './GlobeSection.module.css' 5 import worldTopo from 'world-atlas/countries-110m.json' 6 7 const Globe = lazy(() => import('react-globe.gl')) 8 9 const COUNTRIES = feature(worldTopo, worldTopo.objects.countries).features 10 11 const ARCS = [ 12 { startLat: 25.2, startLng: 55.3, endLat: 51.5, endLng: -0.1, label: 'Dubai → London' }, 13 { startLat: 25.2, startLng: 55.3, endLat: 40.7, endLng: -74.0, label: 'Dubai → New York' }, 14 { startLat: 25.2, startLng: 55.3, endLat: 1.3, endLng: 103.8, label: 'Dubai → Singapore' }, 15 { startLat: 51.5, startLng: -0.1, endLat: 40.7, endLng: -74.0, label: 'London → New York' }, 16 { startLat: 51.5, startLng: -0.1, endLat: 35.7, endLng: 139.7, label: 'London → Tokyo' }, 17 { startLat: 40.7, startLng: -74.0, endLat: 34.0, endLng: -118.2, label: 'New York → LA' }, 18 { startLat: 48.9, startLng: 2.3, endLat: 25.2, endLng: 55.3, label: 'Paris → Dubai' }, 19 { startLat: 35.7, startLng: 139.7, endLat: -33.9, endLng: 151.2, label: 'Tokyo → Sydney' }, 20 { startLat: 1.3, startLng: 103.8, endLat: -33.9, endLng: 151.2, label: 'Singapore → Sydney' }, 21 { startLat: 46.2, startLng: 6.1, endLat: 40.7, endLng: -74.0, label: 'Geneva → New York' }, 22 ] 23 24 const CITIES = [ 25 { lat: 25.2, lng: 55.3, name: 'Dubai' }, 26 { lat: 51.5, lng: -0.1, name: 'London' }, 27 { lat: 40.7, lng: -74.0, name: 'New York' }, 28 { lat: 1.3, lng: 103.8, name: 'Singapore' }, 29 { lat: 35.7, lng: 139.7, name: 'Tokyo' }, 30 { lat: 48.9, lng: 2.3, name: 'Paris' }, 31 { lat: 46.2, lng: 6.1, name: 'Geneva' }, 32 { lat: 34.0, lng: -118.2, name: 'Los Angeles' }, 33 { lat: -33.9, lng: 151.2, name: 'Sydney' }, 34 ] 35 36 export default function GlobeSection() { 37 const sectionRef = useRef(null) 38 const wrapRef = useRef(null) 39 const headRef = useRef(null) 40 const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false) 41 const [size, setSize] = useState(600) 42 43 // Only mount the globe once the section is near viewport (perf) 44 useEffect(() => { 45 const obs = new IntersectionObserver( 46 ([entry]) => { if (entry.isIntersecting) { setMounted(true); obs.disconnect() } }, 47 { rootMargin: '200px' } 48 ) 49 if (sectionRef.current) obs.observe(sectionRef.current) 50 return () => obs.disconnect() 51 }, []) 52 53 // Responsive globe size 54 useEffect(() => { 55 const calc = () => { 56 const w = wrapRef.current?.offsetWidth ?? 600 57 setSize(Math.min(w, 720)) 58 } 59 calc() 60 const ro = new ResizeObserver(calc) 61 if (wrapRef.current) ro.observe(wrapRef.current) 62 return () => ro.disconnect() 63 }, []) 64 65 // Scroll animations 66 useEffect(() => { 67 const section = sectionRef.current 68 if (!section) return 69 70 const ctx = gsap.context(() => { 71 // Headline line reveals 72 const lineInners = headRef.current?.querySelectorAll(`.${styles.lineInner}`) 73 if (lineInners?.length) { 74 gsap.fromTo(lineInners, 75 { yPercent: 110 }, 76 { yPercent: 0, duration: 0.85, ease: 'power3.out', stagger: 0.12, 77 scrollTrigger: { trigger: headRef.current, start: 'top 82%', once: true } } 78 ) 79 } 80 81 // Globe wrap fade + scale 82 gsap.fromTo(wrapRef.current, 83 { opacity: 0, scale: 0.92 }, 84 { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.9, ease: 'power2.out', 85 scrollTrigger: { trigger: wrapRef.current, start: 'top 80%', once: true } } 86 ) 87 }, section) 88 89 return () => ctx.revert() 90 }, []) 91 92 return ( 93
94
95 96
97

GLOBAL NETWORK

98

99 100 Your world 101 102 103 without limits. 104 105

106

107 150+ destinations. Every continent. On demand. 108
